title: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 1
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|title=''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 1}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Last_Stand_On_Ord_Mantell1.jpg]] |title=''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan:
Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 1 |writer=[[Ryder Windham]] |penciller=[[Ramón F. Bachs]] |inker=[[Raul Fernandez]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[Bodhi Tree]] |cover artist=Ramón F. Bachs |editor=[[David Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[December 20]], [[2000]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54469/star_wars_qui-gon_obi-wan_-_last_stand_on_ord_mantell_2000_1|text=Star Wars: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan - Last Stand on Ord Mantell (2000) #1}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]]The date of this story is established internally in relation to {{Film|I}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell]]'' |issue=1 |prev= }} '''''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 1''' was the first issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell]]'' series of comics. It was released [[December 20]], [[2000]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Five years before the events of Episode I, Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn and his apprentice, Obi-Wan Kenobi, are already legendary for their exploits. When a valuable cargo freighter fails to reach its destination on the planet Coruscant, Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan are sent into deep space to search for the missing ship. Their investigation leads them to the distant, lawless world of Ord Mantell, where everyone carries a grudge and a blaster…and Jedi are less than welcome. Despite their powers, the Jedi soon realize that it will take more than the Force and lightsabers to survive! Written by Ryder Windham and illustrated by Ramón F. Bachs, '''''Last Stand on Ord Mantell''''' promises to be the most daring pre-Episode I adventure yet!'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 1}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Last_Stand_On_Ord_Mantell1.jpg|Cover File:Last_Stand_on_Ord_Mantell_1_art.png|Cover by [[Ramón F. Bachs]] File:Last_Stand_on_Ord_Mantell_1_Daniel_Shum_Stewart_variant.png|Variant cover [[Tony Daniel]], [[Howard M. Shum|Howard Shum]] & [[Dave Stewart]] File:Last_Stand_on_Ord_Mantell_1_Photo_variant.png|Photo variant cover File:Last_Stand_on_Ord_Mantell_1_Dynamic_Forces_variant.jpg|Dynamic Forces gold foil variant cover signed & numbered by [[Ryder Windham]] ===Collected in=== *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Rise of the Sith]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars
